svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Reaction Time Architecture" id="Inl1N32j16EzIaHeBaoe"> <mxGraphModel dx="1030" dy="527" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;" value="Push Buttons (x3)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="220" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;" value="STM NUCLEO-U545RE-Q
(Game Logic Controller)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="220" x="300" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;" value="Random Delay Generator" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="440" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;" value="Timer / Reaction Measurement" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="70" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;" value="LCD Display (I2C)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="550" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;" value="LED" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="510" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;" value="Buzzer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="310" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--8" edge="1" parent="1" source="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--1" target="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--9" edge="1" parent="1" source="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--3" target="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--10" edge="1" parent="1" source="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--2" target="bO1rcn7OQoYwc038vBr--4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
